overall.description: A cinematic tracking shot through a GTA V waterfront promenade at sunset, passing two characters (one sitting with a laptop, another standing by the railing) and continuing along a palm-lined path with the Los Santos skyline visible across the water and traffic passing on the adjacent coastal road.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade overlook with city view

agents.ego_description: skateboarding along the waterfront promenade approaching two characters near the railing

notable_agents.action: man sitting on the ground using a laptop with illuminated screen
man standing by the waterfront railing looking out at the city skyline

entered.detail: distant urban skyline with tall buildings silhouetted against the sunset
tall palm trees lining the edge of the promenade
modern street lamps with dual lights on tall poles
low concrete wall and railing separating the walkway from the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a waterfront promenade at dusk with the Los Santos skyline visible across the water. Two characters occupy the foreground—one sitting on the ground using a laptop, another standing by the railing. Palm trees and modern street lamps line the walkway as the camera moves smoothly forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront walkway transitioning to roadside

events.description: passing the sitting character with laptop, leaving the initial overlook area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade past the characters, moving toward the open road section

entered.detail: multi-lane coastal road with vehicles passing by
wooden utility poles with overhead power lines

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the two characters behind and transitions into a more open section of the promenade. The waterfront railing disappears behind as the adjacent multi-lane road becomes visible on the right. Palm trees and street lamps shift to the left side of the frame while utility poles appear along the roadside.

events.description: large truck or bus passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: moving along the promenade curve with active traffic passing on the adjacent road

notable_agents.action: large truck driving along the coastal road, passing from right to left

entered.detail: low-rise commercial structures with illuminated windows along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the curving promenade as commercial buildings appear on the right side along the road. A large truck passes by on the road while the palm trees now line the immediate left edge of the walkway. The city skyline recedes into the distance as the camera continues moving forward along the coastal path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a waterfront promenade at dusk that shifts from an intimate character encounter to a wide view of a coastal transit corridor. It begins by gliding past two characters, one seated with a laptop and another standing by the railing, with the Los Santos skyline shimmering across the water. As the camera moves forward, the railing recedes and the scene opens up to reveal a multi-lane road on the right, while the palm trees and street lamps shift toward the left side of the frame. The path then curves past emerging commercial buildings as a large truck passes on the adjacent road, before finally extending further along the coastal walkway as the city skyline recedes into the distance.
